attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
LEDGER_ID                     
,COALESCE(NAME,'UNKNOWN')                          
,COALESCE(SHORT_NAME,'UNKNOWN')                    
,COALESCE(LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(ALC_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN')          
,COALESCE(OBJECT_TYPE_CODE,'L')              
,COALESCE(LE_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE,'L')          
,COALESCE(CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,-1)          
,COALESCE(CURRENCY_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                 
,COALESCE(PERIOD_SET_NAME,'UNKNOWN')               
,COALESCE(ACCOUNTED_PERIOD_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')         
,COALESCE(FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME,'UNKNOWN')      
,COALESCE(RET_EARN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,-1)  
,COALESCE(SUSPENSE_ALLOWED_FLAG,'N')         
,COALESCE(ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,'N')  
,COALESCE(TRACK_ROUNDING_IMBALANCE_FLAG,'N') 
,COALESCE(ENABLE_AVERAGE_BALANCES_FLAG,'N')  
,COALESCE(ENABLE_BUDGETARY_CONTROL_FLAG,'N') 
,COALESCE(REQUIRE_BUDGET_JOURNALS_FLAG,'N')  
,COALESCE(ENABLE_JE_APPROVAL_FLAG,'N')       
,COALESCE(ENABLE_AUTOMATIC_TAX_FLAG,'N')     
,COALESCE(CONSOLIDATION_LEDGER_FLAG,'N')     
,COALESCE(TRANSLATE_EOD_FLAG,'N')            
,COALESCE(TRANSLATE_QATD_FLAG,'N')           
,COALESCE(TRANSLATE_YATD_FLAG,'N')           
,COALESCE(AUTOMATICALLY_CREATED_FLAG,'N')    
,COALESCE(BAL_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE,'N')     
,COALESCE(BAL_SEG_COLUMN_NAME,'UNKNOWN')           
,COALESCE(MGT_SEG_VALUE_OPTION_CODE,'N')     
,COALESCE(BAL_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID,-1)          
,COALESCE(FUTURE_ENTERABLE_PERIODS_LIMIT,-1)
,COALESCE(LEDGER_ATTRIBUTES,'UNKNOWN')             
,COALESCE(LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0))              
,-1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,COALESCE(CREATION_DATE,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0))                 
,-1 AS CREATED_BY                    
,COALESCE(ENABLE_RECONCILIATION_FLAG,'N')    
,COALESCE(CREATE_JE_FLAG,'N')                
,COALESCE(NET_CLOSING_BAL_FLAG,'N')          
,DESCRIPTION                   
,NULL AS DAILY_TRANSLATION_RATE_TYPE
,NULL AS PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE
,NULL AS PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE
,NULL AS BUDGET_PERIOD_AVG_RATE_TYPE
,NULL AS BUDGET_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE
,'ERPCLOUD' GLOBAL_NAME
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_GL_LEDGERS
WHERE CREATION_DATE > (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(JOB_STREAM_START_TIME),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) - INTERVAL '1' DAY)  
FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAM_RUNS 
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_ST_CLOUD_GL_LEDGERS' 
AND JOB_STREAM_END_TIME IS NOT NULL)
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY LEDGER_ID ORDER BY CREATION_DATE DESC)=1
